basic_details.job_title: ZSS Subarnapur Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Zilla Swasthya Samiti Subarnapur (ZSS Subarnapur) Medical Officer - AYUSH Notification 2026 has been released on 11 June 2026 on the official website of Zilla Swasthya Samiti Subarnapur. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced through the ZSS Subarnapur Medical Officer - AYUSH Recruitment 2026.

selection_process: Selection as per office order no 3418 dated 12.03.2018 of Mission Director

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ZSS Subarnapur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Medical Officer - AYUSH posts is scheduled for 23 June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Medical Officer - AYUSH posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies for the Medical Officer - AYUSH posts in Zilla Swasthya Samiti Subarnapur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates do not need to apply online.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for ZSS Subarnapur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the job type for the Medical Officer - AYUSH posts?
faq.answer: The job type for these posts is Contractual.

faq.question: Q6. Where can I find the official notification for ZSS Subarnapur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article, under "Official Notification PDF".

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable).

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process is as per office order no 3418 dated 12.03.2018 of Mission Director, NHM, Odisha.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of Zilla Swasthya Samiti Subarnapur?
faq.answer: The official website is https://subarnapur.odisha.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 1028 /DPMU/NHM/2026.
